p.strong: One _mm_cmpeq_epi8 instruction compares all 16 byte lanes in parallel.

ul.li: Lane 5 matched (null at position 5) → bit 5 set in mask
Lane 11 matched (null at position 11) → bit 11 set in mask
__builtin_ctz(0x820) returns 5 (position of first null) This is why SIMD string operations are ~16× faster than scalar: the CPU does 16 comparisons in the time of one instruction.

div.p: Note: First parameter (15) goes to lane 15 (MSB). Last parameter (0) goes to lane 0 (LSB).
